calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Jul-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAVID STRYKOWSKI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiff Vladimir Lopoyan appearing in Pro Per and opposing party. Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend, no opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAVID STRYKOWSKI MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiff Vladimir Lopoyan appearing in Pro Per and opposing party. Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
